title: Intra-Corellian Collections
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Intra-Corellian Collections''' was a collections agency that was located in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. It helped individuals and businesses locate debtors to collect payment on old debts.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
